_comment: Hand-built multi-hop corpus (evals/README.md §5.1). Each question's seed is written to be semantically near its ENTRY fact only; the rest of the gold_support chain is reachable through links but uses distinct surface terms, so cosine top-k recovers the entry (and maybe one hop) while link traversal recovers the full constellation. Synthetic = controlled demonstration, not natural-distribution proof.

corpus.content: The Aurora API authenticates incoming requests using short-lived rotating JWT tokens.
Those rotating tokens are minted by an internal service called Keymint.
Keymint keeps its signing material inside the hardware Vault HSM module.
Customer invoices are generated by the Ledger billing engine at the end of each month.
The Ledger engine draws its usage figures from the Meter telemetry pipeline.
Meter aggregates raw consumption events emitted by the per-region Edge collectors.
Production deployments are orchestrated by the Helmsman release controller.
Helmsman gates every rollout behind a Sentinel canary-analysis stage.
Sentinel compares live signals against the Baseline scorecard before it promotes a build.
User profile records are held in the Atlas primary datastore.
Atlas replicates asynchronously to a fleet of Echo read replicas.
The Echo replicas feed the analytics dashboards in the Insight workspace.
Inbound support tickets are triaged by the Concierge routing agent.
Concierge escalates hardware faults to the Forge engineering queue.
The Forge queue is watched around the clock by the on-call Ironside rotation.

questions.seed: how does the Aurora API verify who is calling it
questions.answer: rotating JWTs minted by Keymint, whose keys live in the Vault HSM

questions.seed: what produces the monthly customer invoices
questions.answer: the Ledger engine, using Meter usage data aggregated from Edge collectors

questions.seed: how are production releases rolled out
questions.answer: Helmsman, gated by Sentinel canary analysis against the Baseline scorecard

questions.seed: where do user profiles get stored
questions.answer: the Atlas datastore, replicated to Echo replicas that feed Insight dashboards

questions.seed: how is an incoming support ticket handled
questions.answer: triaged by Concierge, escalated to the Forge queue, watched by Ironside on-call
